report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides — Crypto Passive Income Guide 2026 (staking, restaking, yield farming, lending, liquid staking, yield-bearing stablecoins with APY comparison table) and Cryptocurrency Beginners Guide 2026 (complete onboarding guide covering blockchain basics, buying crypto, wallets, exchanges, investment strategies). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Crypto passive income: ETH staking ~3.3% APY (30% of ETH now staked), SOL 6-8%, restaking via EigenLayer at $17.5B TVL with 3.84-6% APY and $128M+ in operator rewards. Pendle yield tokenization hit $8.27B TVL with 14.5% on Ethena sUSDe pools. Stablecoin base yields 4-5% via tokenized treasuries. Aave lending 4-7% for stablecoins. Yields >10-15% APR are a red flag for sustainability.

Cryptocurrency beginners 2026: Bitcoin ~$1.4T market cap, Ethereum ~$250B. SEC cleared 126 crypto ETFs making access mainstream. Fractional ownership allows starting with $10. DCA is the recommended beginner strategy. Coinbase, Kraken, Binance lead for beginners. Hardware wallets (Ledger, Trezor) essential for cold storage. Seed phrase security (12-24 words) is non-negotiable. 2026 landscape includes Ethereum Pectra upgrade and pending Solana ETF applications.

sections.title: Content Created
items: Crypto Passive Income Guide 2026 — ~3,200 words, 10 sections covering what passive income is, staking fundamentals (ETH/SOL/DOT/ADA APYs), liquid staking (stETH/jitoSOL), EigenLayer restaking, yield farming & LPs (Pendle/Uniswap/Curve), crypto lending (Aave/Morpho/Compound), yield-bearing stablecoins (sDAI/sUSDe/USDS), APY comparison table, risk management & red flags, building a passive income stack, 6 FAQs. 501 lines of TSX.

Cryptocurrency Beginners Guide 2026 — ~3,200 words, 10 sections covering what cryptocurrency is, blockchain technology, types of cryptos (BTC/ETH/SOL/ADA/DOT/MATIC), step-by-step buying guide, wallets (hardware vs software), exchanges, investment strategies (DCA/core-satellite), crypto comparison table (6 assets), common mistakes, next steps for learning, 6 FAQs. 537 lines of TSX.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Passive income guide: title 'Crypto Passive Income Guide 2026: Staking, Yield Farming & Lending | degen0x', target keyword 'crypto passive income guide 2026', article + FAQ schemas (6 questions), 9 internal links to tools and guides

Beginners guide: title 'Cryptocurrency for Beginners: Complete Guide 2026 | degen0x', target keyword 'cryptocurrency beginners guide 2026', article + FAQ schemas (6 questions), 12 internal links to tools and guides
Both pages have OpenGraph + Twitter card metadata, article schema with publishedTime/modifiedTime, FAQ schema for rich snippets, breadcrumb navigation, canonical URLs
